source.label: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Evaluations
source.defaultCorrectionNote: AInsights Index follows the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index evaluation suite weights. The AA-Omniscience correction assigns the full 12.5% component weight to Accuracy and zero weight to the non-hallucination component.

zhihu-adjusted.label: AInsights Index
zhihu-adjusted.description: 按 AA Intelligence Index evaluation suite 原始占比计算；AA-Omniscience 修正为 12.5% 全部计入 Accuracy，非幻觉率权重为 0。

aa-intelligence.label: AA Intelligence
aa-intelligence.description: Artificial Analysis 官方 Intelligence Index。

aa-coding.label: AA Coding
aa-coding.description: Artificial Analysis 官方 Coding Index。

aa-agentic.label: AA Agentic
aa-agentic.description: Artificial Analysis 官方 Agentic Index。

custom.label: 自定义占比
custom.description: 默认使用 AInsights Index 配置；先按可用项求均分，再按用户设置的缺失扣分和覆盖率门槛实时计算。

externalSources.label: Artificial Analysis
externalSources.focus: Composite intelligence, coding, agentic scores, token usage, cost, release date.
externalSources.note: Primary source for AInsights Index scoring and operational metrics.

externalSources.label: Arena / LMArena
externalSources.coverage: Text, code, vision, document, search, image and video arenas
externalSources.focus: Blind side-by-side human preference rankings across real user prompts.
externalSources.note: Useful as a general-experience cross-check, but not directly comparable to fixed benchmark scores.

externalSources.label: LiveBench
externalSources.coverage: Global, reasoning, coding, math, data analysis, language, IF
externalSources.focus: Fresh benchmark releases intended to reduce training-data leakage.
externalSources.note: Useful for checking whether static benchmark wins still hold on newer tasks.

externalSources.label: SWE-bench
externalSources.focus: Real GitHub issue resolution, commonly reported as percent resolved.
externalSources.note: Best treated as an agent/tooling benchmark rather than a pure base-model leaderboard.

externalSources.label: Stanford HELM
externalSources.focus: Transparent, scenario-based evaluation with reproducibility emphasis.
externalSources.note: Useful as a methodology benchmark and source for caveats beyond headline rank.

externalSources.label: Hugging Face Leaderboards
externalSources.coverage: Eval Results, community Spaces, Open LLM Leaderboard archive
externalSources.focus: Hub-hosted model eval results and community-maintained leaderboards.
externalSources.note: Useful for open-model reproducibility checks and benchmark result discovery.

externalSources.label: OpenAI GPT-5.5 launch evaluations
externalSources.focus: BrowseComp, CyberGym, Expert-SWE (Internal), FrontierMath Tier 1-3, FrontierMath Tier 4, GDPval (wins or ties), +4
externalSources.note: Official OpenAI table covering GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4, GPT-5.5 Pro, GPT-5.4 Pro, Claude Opus 4.7, and Gemini 3.1 Pro.

externalSources.label: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 official release
externalSources.focus: BrowseComp, CharXiv Reasoning, CharXiv Reasoning w/ tools, CyberGym, Finance Agent v1.1, GPQA Diamond, +8
externalSources.note: Anthropic official release chart covering Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Mythos Preview across agentic coding, search, tool use, reasoning, and finance benchmarks.

externalSources.label: Anthropic Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 official release
externalSources.focus: AutomationBench, BioMysteryBench hard, BioMysteryBench human solved, Blueprint-Bench 2, ExploitBench (Cap%), FrontierCode Diamond, +9
externalSources.note: Anthropic release table for Claude Mythos 5 / Fable 5. Reported Mythos and Fable scores are within 1-3 percentage points unless starred; the table shows the higher score of the two, and starred rows can differ more because Fable falls back to Opus 4.8 for some cyber and biology requests.

externalSources.label: Qwen3 official release
externalSources.focus: AIME 2024, AIME 2025, BFCL v3, Codeforces Elo, GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench
externalSources.note: Qwen.ai Qwen3 release page. Seed values are read from the official benchmark images for Qwen3-235B-A22B, Qwen3-32B, Qwen3-30B-A3B, and Qwen3-4B; Qwen3 rows are matched to the site's reasoning variants because the release notes indicate think mode is used for the main evaluations.

externalSources.label: Qwen2 official release
externalSources.focus: GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench, MMLU-Pro
externalSources.note: Qwen.ai/Qwen legacy official release page for Qwen2. Seed rows use the published Qwen2-72B-Instruct evaluation table.

externalSources.label: Qwen2.5 official release
externalSources.focus: GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench, MMLU-Pro
externalSources.note: Qwen.ai Qwen2.5 release page with official image tables for Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct, Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct, and Qwen-Turbo.

externalSources.label: Qwen2.5-Coder official release
externalSources.focus: AIME 2024, GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench, MMLU-Pro
externalSources.note: Qwen.ai Qwen2.5-Coder release page. General and math rows are HTML tables; LiveCodeBench is read from the official code benchmark image.

externalSources.label: Qwen2.5-Max official release
externalSources.focus: GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench, MMLU-Pro
externalSources.note: Qwen.ai Qwen2.5-Max release page. Seed values use the official instruct-model comparison chart.

externalSources.label: Qwen3.6-27B official release
externalSources.focus: AIME 2026, Claw-Eval Avg, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, HMMT Feb 2026, LiveCodeBench, +8
externalSources.note: Qwen.ai release page with Qwen3.6/Qwen3.5 benchmark table. Hugging Face is intentionally not used as the primary source for Qwen-family rows.

externalSources.label: Qwen3.6-Plus official release
externalSources.focus: NL2Repo, SWE-bench Multilingual, SWE-Bench Pro, SWE-bench Verified, Terminal-Bench 2.0
externalSources.note: Qwen.ai proprietary model release page. Seed values are from the official launch benchmark image/table when HTML parsing cannot read the rendered image.

externalSources.label: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview official release
externalSources.focus: NL2Repo, Terminal-Bench 2.0
externalSources.note: Qwen.ai proprietary preview release. Seeded rows are limited to values derivable from official deltas over Qwen3.6-Plus; image-only absolute rows are left for parser/OCR follow-up.

externalSources.label: DeepSeek-V4 official release
externalSources.focus: BrowseComp, GDPval-AA Elo, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, HLE w/ tools, HMMT Feb 2026, +8
externalSources.note: DeepSeek API Docs V4 preview release. Seed values mirror the official release report; Hugging Face is kept out of source URLs for this top-model collector.

externalSources.label: Kimi K2.6 official release
externalSources.focus: AIME 2026, BrowseComp, DeepSearchQA F1, GPQA Diamond, HLE w/ tools, HMMT Feb 2026, +10
externalSources.note: Moonshot AI Kimi.com release page with coding, agentic, search, and visual-agent benchmark tables.

externalSources.label: Kimi K2 Thinking official release
externalSources.focus: BrowseComp, GPQA Diamond, HLE w/ tools, LiveCodeBench, MMLU-Pro, SciCode, +3
externalSources.note: Moonshot AI official Kimi K2 Thinking release page with search, coding, and reasoning benchmarks.

externalSources.label: Kimi K2.5 official release
externalSources.focus: AIME 2026, BrowseComp, GPQA Diamond, HLE w/ tools, LiveCodeBench, MMMU-Pro, +3
externalSources.note: Moonshot AI Kimi.com K2.5 release page evaluation results.

externalSources.label: Kimi K2 0905 official model card
externalSources.focus: Multi-SWE-Bench, SWE-bench Multilingual, SWE-bench Verified, Terminal-Bench
externalSources.note: Moonshot AI official Hugging Face model card for Kimi-K2-Instruct-0905. Reported K2 0905 values are mean results over five full-test-set runs.

externalSources.label: Kimi K2 official GitHub report
externalSources.focus: AIME 2024, GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench, SWE-bench Verified
externalSources.note: Moonshot AI Kimi K2 GitHub README and technical report benchmark table.

externalSources.label: Z.ai GLM-4.6 official model card
externalSources.focus: AIME 2025, BrowseComp, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, HLE w/ tools, LiveCodeBench, +3
externalSources.note: Z.ai developer documentation / GLM-4.6 release page. Seed values preserve the official benchmark image for agentic, reasoning, and coding evaluations.

externalSources.label: Z.ai GLM-5.1 official model card
externalSources.focus: AIME 2026, BrowseComp, BrowseComp (Context Manage), CyberGym, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, +9
externalSources.note: Z.ai developer documentation / official release page with GLM-5.1, GLM-5, and GLM-4.7 benchmark table.

externalSources.label: Z.ai GLM-4.5 official report
externalSources.focus: AIME 2024, BFCL v3, BrowseComp, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, LiveCodeBench, +5
externalSources.note: Z.ai GLM-4.5 official blog/report covering ARC benchmarks.

externalSources.label: Google DeepMind Gemini 3.1 Pro model card
externalSources.focus: APEX-Agents, ARC-AGI-2, BrowseComp, GDPval-AA Elo, GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench Pro, +11
externalSources.note: Google DeepMind model card with cross-model benchmark context and Gemini 3.1 Pro results.

externalSources.label: Google Gemma 4 official model card
externalSources.focus: AIME 2026, BigBench Extra Hard, Codeforces Elo, GPQA Diamond, LiveCodeBench, MMLU-Pro, +1
externalSources.note: Google Gemma model card covering Gemma 4 31B, 26B-A4B, E4B, and E2B instruction-tuned benchmarks.

externalSources.label: MiniMax M2.5 official release
externalSources.focus: AA-LCR, AIME 2025, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, IFBench, Multi-SWE-Bench, +5
externalSources.note: MiniMax M2.5 release page with official benchmark charts for M2.5 and M2.1 across agentic coding and reasoning evaluations.

externalSources.label: MiniMax M2 official release
externalSources.focus: BrowseComp, Multi-SWE-Bench, SWE-bench Verified, Terminal-Bench
externalSources.note: MiniMax M2 release page with official agentic benchmark charts. Seed rows keep the chart values where the page renders the data as images.

externalSources.label: MiniMax M1 official GitHub report
externalSources.focus: AIME 2024, AIME 2025, FullStackBench, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, LiveCodeBench, +4
externalSources.note: MiniMax-AI official GitHub README benchmark table for MiniMax-M1-80K and MiniMax-M1-40K.

externalSources.label: Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 official release
externalSources.focus: Claw-Eval Avg, GPQA Diamond, MMLU-Pro, SWE-Bench Pro, SWE-bench Verified, Terminal-Bench 2.0
externalSources.note: Xiaomi MiMo official release/open-source page. Seed rows retain official benchmark values when the page renders charts as images.

externalSources.label: Cohere North Mini Code model card
externalSources.focus: Cohere documentation for North Mini Code: model ID north-mini-code-1-0, 256K context window, 64K max output, Apache 2.0 license, and agentic coding use cases.
externalSources.note: Cohere documentation for North Mini Code: model ID north-mini-code-1-0, 256K context window, 64K max output, Apache 2.0 license, and agentic coding use cases.

externalSources.focus: AA-LCR, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, IFBench, LiveCodeBench, MMLU-Pro, +9

externalSources.focus: AA-LCR, AIME 2025, BFCL v4, GPQA Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, HLE w/ tools, +9
